rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate 2/10 and reach the identical conclusion: a strong full-stack/software engineer who lacks the SoC modeling, hardware-software co-design, and AI accelerator expertise the Principal Performance Architect role requires. The differences are pure rewording and ordinary run-to-run variation (e.g., '12 years' vs 'a decade', mentioning GIS/mobile focus) with no concern, score shift, or reasoning that references the location change from Berlin to San Francisco. The address carries no job-relevant signal and nothing in the variant keys off it.
